column1: # Sample tags created on first boot.
# Format: TSV with header row, one tag per line.
# Columns: id, name, slug, description, color, icon, is_primary, position
#   - id        : integer; explicit so seed discussions can be reasoned about
#                 (note: upstream Flarum Tags seeds a "General" tag at id=1, so
#   - slug      : URL slug (also how seed discussions reference tags)
#   - is_primary: 1 = appears in main category list, 0 = secondary tag
#   - position  : order among primary tags; use \N for NULL on secondary tags
# Imported by scripts/import-tabular.php using PDO prepared statements.
